meta.description: GG Software builds web apps, internal tools, and landing pages that actually get delivered. Fast, fixed-price, no bloat — you work directly with the developers writing your code.

webApps.title: Web Apps

about.title: Who we are
about.description: GG Software is a small, focused team of developers. We skip the account managers and the overhead — you work directly with the people writing your code. That's how we stay fast and affordable.

contact.title: Let's build something
contact.intro: Tell us what you need. We'll get back to you within 24 hours.
